source_file: 4-5.FL.2 Handout C. SMART Goal Progress Tracker.pdf
output_file: 4-5.FL.2 Handout C. SMART Goal Progress Tracker.md

analysis.summary: This is a progress tracking handout for grades 4-5 students as part of Financial Literacy Lesson 2. It provides a structured format for students to monitor their SMART goal progress and includes reflection questions for learning assessment.

entities.name: SMART Goal Progress Tracker
entities.description: A structured tracking sheet for monitoring goal progress with dates, tasks, progress status, and comments

entities.name: Grades 4-5 Financial Literacy Lesson 2
entities.description: The second lesson in a financial literacy curriculum designed for elementary students in grades 4 and 5

entities.name: SMART Goals
entities.description: Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound goal-setting framework

entities.name: Progress Status Categories
entities.description: Three-tier classification system: Completed, In Progress, Not Started

entities.name: Final Reflection Questions
entities.description: Three reflective questions focusing on goal achievement, learning outcomes, and future application

entities.name: Handout C
entities.description: The third handout resource in the lesson sequence

relationships.context: The progress tracker is Handout C within the lesson structure
The tracker is specifically designed to monitor SMART goals
The status categories are integrated into the tracking system
Reflection questions conclude the progress tracking process
The reflection questions evaluate SMART goal achievement and learning outcomes
Handout C is the document containing the progress tracker
